acceptance_criteria:
1. raw_value() method returning plain Value
2. baml_value_to_jinja conversion function
3. All BamlValue variants handled
4. Null -> Value::from(()) for 'is none' checks
5. Class treated as map
6. Enum returns variant string
7. Unit tests for .raw behavior
8. cargo test passes
title: Implement JinjaPromptValue .raw for untyped bypass

description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/tools.rs] Create LlmTools PyO3 class with agent, max_llm_calls, call_count. Implement llm_query(prompt) and llm_query_batched(prompts). Raise PyRuntimeError on call limit exceeded with DSPy-exact message.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Phase 4): add `LlmTools` module (likely `src/tools.rs`).
- Wraps agent to provide `llm_query` / `llm_query_batched` callable from REPL.
- Enforce `max_llm_calls` with DSPy‑exact RuntimeError message.
- Expose to Python globals in `TypedRlm::call` via `_llm_tools`.

title: Task 4.6: Create LlmTools module
